name: Cloak of Invisibility
overview: A legendary cloak that grants temporary invisibility through its hood.

properties.charges: This cloak has 3 charges and regains 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn
properties.activation: While wearing the cloak, you can take a Magic action to pull its hood over your head and expend 1 charge to give yourself the Invisible condition for 1 hour
properties.deactivation: The effect ends early if you pull the hood down (no action required) or cease wearing the cloak
